titleStmt.title: SII 25.16: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 16. (A.R. No. 16 of 1908.) DĀRĀŚURAM, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Below a belt of sculptures in the walls around the central shrine in the Airāvatēśvara temple.
These label inscriptions may be assigned to the 12-13th century, on grounds of palaeography.
These describe the sculptures represented above them which depict the scenes from the lives of the devotees of god Śiva. Among them, a few may belong to the group of 63 Śaiva-saints.
For the details of these labels and those that are painted on the outer gōpura nearby, see A.R.E.p., 1908, part II, para 66-67, pp. 68-69.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avināciyāṇṭār mutaḷai vāyppiḷḷai .
tirumurukaṉ pūṇṭiyil peṟṟapaṭi .
Uṭaiya nampiyai veṭar vaḻipaṟittaviṭam ..
. Uṭaiya nampikku Olleṉṟaruḷiṉpaṭi ..
Uṭaiya nampiyai Āṇṭukoṇṭaruḷiṉapaṭi .
Āvaṇa Ōlai kāṭṭiṉapaṭi .
Uṭaiyanampi Eḻuntaruḷukiṟār .
Icai ñāniyār .
caṭaiyaṉār
tirunilakaṇṭap perumpāṇaṉār
^1^kociṅkaperumāḷ .
necāṇṭār
pāṇṭi mātevi .
Appālum Aṭiccānta Aṭiyār ..
. muḻuniṟupūciya munivar ..
. mukkālum tirumeni tīṇṭuvār ..
. tiruvāruṟ piṟantār .
paramaṉaiye pāṭuvār .
pattarāyppaṇivār .
koḻppuliyāṇṭār ..
. pukaḻt tuṇaiyār .
cerut tuṇaiyāṇṭār .
Iṭaṅkaḻiyāṇṭār .
kaḻaṟciṅkanār .
muṉaiyaṭuvār [*]

vāyilār [*]
neṭumāṟaṉār .
kāriyār [*]
koyilāṟ .
kaṇampulāṇṭār .
Aiyyaṭikaḷ kāṭavarkonār .
cattiyāṇṭār
kaliyaṉār .
-... kalikkampāṇṭār katai ....
Atipattar katai .
. naraciṅka muṉaiyaraiyar .
pukaḻc coḻanār ....
. poyyaṭimaiyillāta pulavar .§
... kūṟṟuvaṉār ....
kaṇanātāṇṭār katai ..
ceramāṉ perumāḷ katai .
ciṟuttoṇṭāṉṭār katai [.]
cākkiyaṉār [.]Besides these there are the following names of Śaiva devotees painted with red but not cut:
1 cirappuliyāṇṭār |
2 comāci māṟaṉār |
3 eyar koṉ kalikkāmāṇṭār |
4 āḷuṭaiyapiḷḷaiyār |
5 naminanti aṭikaḷ |
6 cey nallūr piḷḷaiyār |
7 tirunāḷaip povār |
8 iḷaiyamāṟaṅkuṭi māṟar |
Digital edition of SII 25.16 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
